news.title: Extra-Wide Banner
news.summary: A 4.15:1 banner must remain readable without stretching.
news.category: Extremely Long Category Name That Must Truncate Safely

news.title: Portrait Poster
news.summary: A tall flyer must fit inside a bounded card without losing text.

news.title: Broken Remote Image
news.summary: The bundled announcement artwork must replace a failed image request.

news.title: Announcement Without an Image
news.summary: Missing artwork and dates must produce intentional fallbacks.

news.title: Unsafe URLs Are Rejected
news.summary: JavaScript links and non-image data URLs must never reach the interface.

news.title: This Draft Must Not Render
news.summary: Draft CMS entries are filtered before display.

shifts.speaker: A speaker name that remains readable when the CMS provides a longer value
shifts.topic: A longer khutbah topic that checks wrapping across compact devices and larger accessibility text settings
